Done — I scheduled the one-hour "Follow-up Meeting" for 2024-05-19 from 11:30 to 12:30 with the description: "Follow-up to discuss project status and next steps." Participants: you (emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com).

Notes:
- I initially checked 10:00 as requested, but there's a conflicting "Project Kick-off" at 10:00–11:00 and a one-on-one at 11:00–11:30, so I booked the next available one-hour slot starting at 11:30.
- If you want me to invite other participants, set a different time, or add a location/attachments, tell me which attendees (email addresses), what time you'd prefer, or the location/attachments to include.
